cues.text: 他比我大八歲
cues.tr: Lesson 13: He's eight years older than me

cues.text: 你有兄弟姐妹嗎？
cues.tr: Do you have any brothers or sisters?
cues.speaker: A

cues.text: 有，我有一個哥哥，他比我大八歲。
cues.tr: Yes, I have a brother who is eight years older than me.
cues.speaker: B

cues.text: 哇，八歲差距不小呢！你們的性格像不像？
cues.tr: Wow, eight years is a big difference! Are your personalities similar?
cues.speaker: A

cues.text: 不太像，他比較外向一些，喜歡跟朋友出去玩。
cues.tr: Not really. He is more outgoing and likes to go out with his friends.
cues.speaker: B

cues.text: 那你呢？
cues.tr: What about you?
cues.speaker: A

cues.text: 我比較內向一點，喜歡在家看書或者畫畫。
cues.tr: I'm a bit more introverted, I like to read or draw at home.
cues.speaker: B

cues.text: 這樣的話，你們的性格應該很不一樣吧？
cues.tr: In that case, your personalities should be very different, right?
cues.speaker: A

cues.text: 對啊，他做事很果斷，而我很容易猶豫不決。
cues.tr: Yes, he is very decisive, while I am very hesitant.
cues.speaker: B

cues.text: 那他會不會給你一些建議？
cues.tr: Will he give you some advice?
cues.speaker: A

cues.text: 會的，他總是告訴我要多嘗試新東西，不要怕失敗。
cues.tr: Yes, he always tells me to try new things and not to be afraid of failure.
cues.speaker: B

cues.text: 這是個不錯的優點啊！
cues.tr: That's a good point!
cues.speaker: A

cues.text: 嗯，這讓我更有勇氣去做決定。
cues.tr: Well, it gives me more courage to make decisions.
cues.speaker: B

cues.text: 你覺得你們兄弟間還有什麼優缺點呢？
cues.tr: What do you think are the other strengths and weaknesses of your brothers?
cues.speaker: A

cues.text: 哥哥的優點是他很有責任心，總是照顧我。
cues.tr: My brother's strength is that he is very responsible and always takes care of me.
cues.speaker: B

cues.text: 很好啊！但是缺點呢？
cues.tr: That's good! But what about the disadvantages?
cues.speaker: A

cues.text: 有時候他太嚴肅了，我們的興趣不太一樣，溝通上有點困難。
cues.tr: Sometimes he is too serious, our interests are not quite the same, communication is a little difficult.
cues.speaker: B

cues.text: 我明白，年齡差距比較大的時候，有時會有代溝。
cues.tr: I understand that when there is a big age difference, sometimes there is a generation gap.
cues.speaker: A

cues.text: 對啊，他有時不太理解我的想法。不過他還是常常給我很好的建議。
cues.tr: Yes, sometimes he doesn't quite understand what I think. But he still gives me good advice.
cues.speaker: B

cues.text: 那如果哥哥比你小呢？
cues.tr: What if your brother is younger than you?
cues.speaker: A

cues.text: 如果他比我小，可能我就要照顧他，壓力會大一些吧。
cues.tr: If he is younger than me, I may have to take care of him, and the pressure will be greater.
cues.speaker: B

cues.text: 說得對，每個年齡段都有不同的挑戰。
cues.tr: That's right, every age group has different challenges.
cues.speaker: A

cues.text: 是啊，現在他比我成熟一些，讓我學到了很多。
cues.tr: Yes, now that he's more mature than me, I've learned a lot.
cues.speaker: B

cues.text: 這樣聽起來，你們的關係還不錯。
cues.tr: So it sounds like you two have a good relationship.
cues.speaker: A

cues.text: 是的，雖然有差異，但我們還是彼此的支柱。
cues.tr: Yes, despite the differences, we are still each other's pillars.
cues.speaker: B
